note: Sample outputs from 5 test scenarios. Run 'python main.py --scenario N' for live results.

scenarios.query: How do I enable dark mode in my account?
scenarios.response_summary: Dark mode is available on all plans including Starter. Enable it via Settings → Appearance → Theme → Dark. No upgrade required.

scenarios.query: I'm on the Starter plan but I need API access for my automation workflow.
scenarios.response_summary: API access is not included in the Starter plan. It requires the Pro plan ($299/month) which includes 1,000 API calls/month, advanced analytics, webhooks, and priority support.

scenarios.query: Your docs say unlimited API calls on Pro but I'm rate-limited after 1000/month.

conflicts.description: Marketing docs claimed 'unlimited API calls' for Pro. Actual limit is 1,000/month.
conflicts.resolution: Feature matrix (live system data) is authoritative. Documentation is outdated/incorrect.

scenarios.response_summary: Confirmed conflict: marketing documentation incorrectly stated unlimited API calls for Pro. The actual contractual limit is 1,000 calls/month. Enterprise plan offers truly unlimited access. We apologize for the confusion in our documentation.

scenarios.query: Waiting 10 days on critical issue, 24h SLA contract, $500/day loss. Escalate immediately.
scenarios.response_summary: SLA violation confirmed. Contract guarantees 4-hour response (Enterprise plan). 10 days elapsed = 236 hours, exceeding SLA by 232 hours. Escalation ticket created (P1). Customer Success team notified. Service credit of 10% MRR per day will be applied per contract terms.

scenarios.query: We have 15 users but plan shows only 10 seats. Help with licensing.
scenarios.response_summary: Account shows 15 users against a 10-seat Starter plan — 5-seat overage detected. Options: (1) Upgrade to Pro (up to 50 seats, $299/month) — recommended. (2) Reduce active users to 10. An onboarding specialist can assist with the migration and user setup.
